description: A screenshot of a government press release rendered as black text on a white background. The bold headline reads USCIS Increases Screening, Vetting of Aliens Working in U.S., followed by a release date of 12/04/2025 and an italic subhead. Several paragraphs of body text describe a U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services policy update reducing the maximum validity period of certain Employment Authorization Documents, including a quoted statement attributed to the agency director. A hyperlink labeled Policy Manual appears in the first paragraph.
notable_text: USCIS Increases Screening, Vetting of Aliens Working in U.S.; Release Date : 12/04/2025; Employment Authorization Documents (EAD)
